resources.string:
AquaTrack helps you monitor your daily hydration based on your body weight.
Enter your weight in kilograms in the Settings screen. The app calculates your recommended daily water intake using the formula:
weight × 0.0325
This gives your daily goal in liters.
You can then add your water intake in milliliters on the Home screen. Your progress is displayed in liters along with a progress bar to help you stay on track.
AquaTrack also stores your daily intake history so you can review your hydration habits over time.

Staying properly hydrated is essential for maintaining good health.
Benefits of drinking enough water include:
• Regulating body temperature • Improving brain function and focus • Supporting digestion and nutrient absorption • Keeping skin healthy • Preventing fatigue and dehydration
Make hydration a daily habit with AquaTrack!
